old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-mkaq","title":"Reject partial TUN packet writes","description":"Gateway TUN send loop treats positive short writes as progress and writes the remainder as another packet. TUN is packet-oriented, so any n != packet length, including zero, must fail rather than split the IPv6 packet. Add syscall-level fault injection tests.
